allOf.description: The delivery medium to send the MFA code. You can use this parameter to set only the SMS delivery medium value.
The attribute name of the MFA option type. The only valid value is phone_number.

items.description: This data type is no longer supported. Applies only to SMS multi-factor authentication (MFA) configurations. Does not apply to time-based one-time password (TOTP) software token MFA configurations.
